scenarios.name: Structure a Next.js project for Claude Code
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic clean-code advice without the CLAUDE.md template, small-file/barrel pattern, or named Spec-Generate-Review-Test-Iterate loop the rubric checks for.

scenarios.name: Multi-file feature via spec-first iteration
scenarios.rationale: Baseline recommends small commits but lacks the written spec artifact (What/How/Edge cases/Template) handed to the AI and the explicit chunked iteration with per-chunk review/commit shown in the skill.
